mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grammar_practice_items (user_id, level, exam_type, topic, target_rules, items, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{level}, #{examType}, #{topic}, #{targetRulesJson}, #{itemsJson}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, level, exam_type, topic, target_rules AS target_rules_json, items AS items_json, created_at FROM grammar_practice_items WHERE id = #{itemId}
SELECT id, user_id, level, exam_type, topic, target_rules AS target_rules_json, items AS items_json, created_at FROM grammar_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grammar_practice_attempts (practice_item_id, user_id, answers, score, created_at) VALUES (#{practiceItemId}, #{userId}, #{answersJson}, #{score}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, a.practice_item_id AS practice_item_id, i.level AS level, i.exam_type AS exam_type, i.topic AS topic, a.score AS score, a.created_at AS created_at FROM grammar_practice_attempts a JOIN grammar_practice_items i ON i.id = a.practice_item_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, i.level AS level, i.exam_type AS exam_type, i.topic AS topic, i.items AS items_json, a.answers AS answers_json, a.score AS score, a.created_at AS created_at FROM grammar_practice_attempts a JOIN grammar_practice_items i ON i.id = a.practice_item_id WHERE a.id = #{attemptId} AND a.user_id = #{userId}
